facilities.name: Community Hall
facilities.description: Main community hall for events, functions, and gatherings.

policy.chargesInfo: Community Hall bookings may attract a maintenance/cleaning fee and a refundable security deposit as decided by the committee. The manager will confirm the applicable amount before approving your request. Any damage to property is recovered from the deposit.

rules: Bookings must be requested at least 24 hours in advance.
Cleanliness of the hall is the responsibility of the booking owner.
Any damage to property will be recovered from the security deposit.
